channel.title: GRIDWATCH
channel.description: Outages x weather x data center proximity, Midwest to Atlantic

item.title: GRIDWATCH 2026-07-22T12:52Z — 1126 outages, 29,599 customers, 711 fair-weather, 11 DC-proximate
item.description: VAWV-APCO: 1839 cust (WEATHER-LIKELY) | OH-AEP: 1500 cust (UNEXPLAINED FAIR-WEATHER) | VA-DOM: 1359 cust (WEATHER-LIKELY) | VA-DOM: 1048 cust (WEATHER-LIKELY) | VA-DOM: 910 cust (WEATHER-LIKELY)

item.title: Weekly digest — week ending 2026-07-19: 8322 outages, 41.9% fair-weather
